creator: Brett.Diamond+FreeBSD@gmail.com
text:
The handbook corresponding with the new FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE version is available from the main web page (http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/), and indeed is the only version displayed. However, the documentation section of the FreeBSD ftp server still has the older version (ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/).

Fix: 

Update documentation on FreeBSD distribution sites
How-To-Repeat: n/a
